creator: danm@prime.gushi.org
text:
Apache's forensic_log is built from ports, and comes with a script called check_forensic (included in the support subdir) to parse these logs.

Fix: 

Probably requires patching of the port's makefile.  Probably a simple patch as well.
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/www/apache22, make config, select mod_log_forensic, make install
